channel.title: Business on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Business on jamesm.blog

item.title: Scott Galloway on AI: The Marketing Professor's Case That the Rich Don't Need You Anymore
item.description: A grounded look at Scott Galloway - the NYU marketing professor and serial entrepreneur arguing that AI is a late-stage bubble, that AI was built for the rich, and that storytelling and relationships are the skills the next decade rewards.
